signup.passwordHint: At least 6 characters, one letter, one digit, no spaces.
signup.displayNamePlaceholder: How you appear in the app
signup.errorRequired: Display name, email, and password are required.
signup.errorTeamName: Enter a name for your family team.

home.emptyBody: Approved challenge posts will show up here.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.emptyRunningBody: Your team can join an active event below to unlock challenges. Completed challenges disappear from this list. Days follow your profile time zone.
challenges.emptyIdleBody: Join a team enrolled in an active tournament to see challenges here. Completed challenges disappear from this list. Days follow your profile time zone.

challengeDetail.noInstructions: No extra instructions — show us what you did!

challengePost.hint: Add up to {{max}} photos and/or a caption. When you add photos, you will place optional face stickers on the next screen before submitting. Caption-only posts skip that step.
challengePost.errorLibrary: Photo library access is needed to add images.
challengePost.errorCamera: Camera access is needed to take a photo.
challengePost.errorCaptionOrPhotos: Add a short note for a text-only post, or add photos to continue to stickers.
challengePost.cameraWebBody: Use a device with the Expo app to take a photo, or choose from the library on web.

challengeEditor.sub: Choose a sticker, and tap to place it

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Active tournaments your team is enrolled in
leaderboard.emptyBody: When your team is enrolled in a tournament that is running on your profile time zone, team rankings appear here. Same active window as the Challenges tab.

profile.title: Profile
profile.permLibraryBody: Photo library access is required to choose a picture.
profile.permCameraBody: Camera access is required to take a picture.
profile.cameraWebBody: Taking a photo is not supported in the browser. Use a device with the app installed.
profile.photoSourceMessage: How would you like to add a photo?

crop.hint: Pinch to zoom inside the square. Drag the photo to frame your shot.
